## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open ...
2. Do ...
3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

- AutoCAD version if known (check the `$ACADVER` header in the file)
- Whether the file loads in AutoCAD / another viewer
